labels.description: the kinds of narrative an agent writes on a task
labels.name: ATM:comment:*

labels.description: task comment kind: a decision recorded during work
labels.name: ATM:comment:decision

labels.description: task comment kind: an open question raised during work
labels.name: ATM:comment:open-question

labels.description: task comment kind: a progress note during work
labels.name: ATM:comment:progress

labels.description: index tasks whose description is the payload: agent directions, repos, docs, questions
labels.name: ATM:context:*

labels.description: the task's description captures agent-direction notes for this project: build/test/lint commands, conventions, and gotchas a working agent must know
labels.name: ATM:context:agent

labels.description: the task's description points at a specific document (file path or URL) and summarizes what it covers, so a later agent can decide whether to read it
labels.name: ATM:context:documentation

labels.description: the task's description poses an open question or ambiguity about the project that a human or later agent should clarify; not a defect, not a work item, a gap in understanding
labels.name: ATM:context:question

labels.description: the task's description names a code repository (path or URL), what it contains, and how to work in it; a later agent reads this to orient
labels.name: ATM:context:repository

labels.description: every open task: the project's active work. Default board in the TUI.
labels.name: ATM:open-tasks

labels.description: optional urgency ranking; absent means default priority
labels.name: ATM:priority:*

labels.description: optional prioritization: high; do this first, everything untagged is default priority
labels.name: ATM:priority:high

labels.description: lifecycle state of a task; exactly one status label should be present
labels.name: ATM:status:*

labels.description: workflow state: blocked; task cannot proceed pending something else
labels.name: ATM:status:blocked

labels.description: workflow state: done; task is complete
labels.name: ATM:status:done

labels.description: workflow state: in-progress; someone is actively working on this
labels.name: ATM:status:in-progress

labels.description: workflow state: open; task is not started or is being considered
labels.name: ATM:status:open
